prompt: Create a cinematic travel-poster style night photograph of Lisbon, showing a steep old European cobblestone street descending into the distance with shiny tram tracks running down the center, historic narrow buildings on both sides, iron balconies and shuttered windows, warm amber street lamps glowing on the right and along the street, a deep blue night sky, and distant softly blurred hilltop lights. Use shallow depth of field and moody bokeh, with wet or polished cobblestones reflecting the lamps. Composition: landscape 3:2, the street curves from the lower right toward the center background, right side warmly lit, left side darker and shadowed, with the background slightly out of focus. Add elegant overlaid typography on the left half: a large white handwritten script word Lisbon spanning from lower-left to center, and beneath it two centered lines in small gold widely spaced serif capitals reading BEAUTIFUL NIGHTS and UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES. Under the subtitles, add thin gold horizontal divider lines on both sides of a small gold four-petal ornament. Sophisticated luxury travel branding, romantic atmosphere, high contrast, warm golden highlights, realistic photography, no people, no vehicles, no extra text, no watermark.
